name: Effect
desc: Plays a sound effect or particle effect at a position (without a named sound).

fields.name: disableRelativeVolume
fields.desc: If true, plays at full volume regardless of position

notes: Effect IDs: 1000-1023 (sound events), 1500-2004 (particle events). Unlike S29 (named sound via resource location), S28 uses numeric IDs.

modules.name: ESP
modules.purpose: Track world effects (record player, particles, etc.).

modules.name: ParticleSpoof
modules.purpose: Track world effects (record player, particles, etc.).
